releaseNotes:
Live TV: live info card hides with the player controls.
Back from fullscreen: smoother return to channel list.
TV Guide: channel logos stay a uniform size.
Sports Report: better league package matching; NBA/NFL/MLB/NHL/MLS/WNBA can open the live player directly.
Auto-tagging: games linked to streams; LIVE badge on matching channels.
Set apkDirectUrl after you attach the APK to this release.
